source_pr.title: expression: support enum pushdown
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:

- This PR enables enum pushdown together with https://github.com/tikv/tikv/pull/9648

### What is changed and how it works?

- Set `EnumSetAsInt` flag for `Enum` types when casting enum as int
- Support Encoding/Decoding of `Enum` type

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test
- Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- No code

Side effects

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- Support enum pushdown. <!-- Please write a release note here to describe the change you made when it is released to the users of TiDB. If your PR doesn't involve any change to TiDB(like test enhancements, RFC proposals...), you can write `No release note`. -->

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: // test order by (expression/integration_test.go).
